principles.title: Safe Progressive Overload
principles.description: Progression should remain conservative and bounded when recent execution quality or recovery confidence is uncertain.

principles.title: Readiness Before Intensity
principles.description: When readiness and fatigue indicators diverge, preserve adherence and reduce risk with hold or deload actions.

principles.title: Limitation-Aware Substitution
principles.description: Substitution should keep session intent while avoiding limitation-conflicting movement patterns.

principles.title: Fatigue Guardrail
principles.description: Escalating fatigue signals require explicit caution messaging and a prudent forecast for the next session.
